steps.title: Set the doubling condition
steps.content: The model is $f(t)=45{,}000(2)^{t/640}$. The population doubles when the multiplier based on $2$ is exactly $2$, so the exponent must be $1$.

steps.title: Solve for time
steps.content: Set the exponent equal to $1$. $$\frac{t}{640}=1$$ $$t=640$$ The answer is 640.
